member.title: Member
member.description: Details of a registered mess member

name.description: Display name of the mess member

joinDate.description: The date when member joined the mess

expense.title: Expense
expense.description: Daily bazaar and food expenses in the mess

date.description: The date of the bazaar purchase

desc.description: Details or list of item purchased

createdBy.description: User UID who recorded the expense

utility.title: Utility
utility.description: Utility bills like electricity, gas, water

deposit.title: Deposit
deposit.description: Cash balance paid by a member to the mess ledger

memberId.description: Referenced ID of the member who deposited cash

duty.title: Duty
duty.description: Sweekly bazaar duty and manager scheduling

day.description: Bengali weekday from Saturday to Friday

messSettings.title: Mess Settings
messSettings.description: Specific preferences and state of the overall mess

messNotification.title: Mess Notification
messNotification.description: Real-time audit log of system events like expense logs or member updates

message.description: Descriptive message matching Bengali or English

timestamp.description: Epoch timestamp of when event occurred

/messes/{messId}/members/{memberId}.description: The active roster of registered members under this mess entity

/messes/{messId}/expenses/{expenseId}.description: Daily bazaar list ledger for the specific mess

/messes/{messId}/deposits/{memberId}.description: Paid-in member balance documents indexed by individual identifiers

/messes/{messId}/settings/current.description: System state including custom fixed meal ratios

/messes/{messId}/notifications/{logId}.description: Audit trails for real-time notifications pushes of recent operations
